title: guettardella philippinensis
intro: Guettardella philippinensis, also known as Philippine Guettardella, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family that is native to the Philippines. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Guettardella philippinensis include relief from fever, cough, and sore throat, as well as the treatment of various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Guettardella philippinensis include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
